member.name: M:GTA.Vehicle.BringToHalt(System.Single,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Starts the task to decelerate this
until it comes to rest, possibly in an unphysically short distance.
member.param: The distance from the initial coords at which the vehicle should come to rest.
The length of time in seconds to hold the car at rest after stopping.

If
, the task allows gravity to act normally in the Z direction. If
, the task will also arrest the car's vertical velocity.
